prompt: A solitary person wearing dark unstructured clothing standing alone in the center of a large circular mirror hall. There is no one within a large radius of them — vast empty cool blue-silver polished concrete floor surrounds them. The mirror panels lining the circular wall multiply reflections into deep swirling clusters. In the immediate foreground mirrors the figure sees only a single lonely reflection of themselves. But as reflections recede deeper into nested mirrors they become progressively and dramatically more crowded — the central figure is replicated countless times surrounded by a dense almost chaotic crowd of identical figures all clustering closely together visibly touching. Physical room remains sparse and monochromatic. Cool blue silver ambient lighting. Surreal photorealistic detail 8k cinematic composition.
visual_logic: One isolated figure sees sparse nearby reflections but dense crowds in distant mirrors — everyone perceives their friends as more connected than themselves.
